issue.body:

filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)`, `애드가드 갤러리 DNS 필터 (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zziniswell/Adguard-gallery-filter/main/DNS.txt)` Filters: | Ad blocking:
